query:
INSERT INTO river_waypoints (river_waypoint_id, river_id, user_id, waypoint_name, description, waypoint, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6, ?7, ?8)
            ON CONFLICT (river_waypoint_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                river_id = ?2,
                user_id = ?3,
                waypoint_name = ?4,
                description = ?5,
                waypoint = ?6,
                created_at = ?7,
                updated_at = ?8
            RETURNING river_waypoint_id;
